## Checklist

- [ ] `ruff check .` and `ruff format --check .` pass
- [ ] `mypy src` passes
- [ ] `pytest` passes with coverage ≥ 90 % on touched code
- [ ] Public API / CLI changes reflected in `CHANGELOG.md`
- [ ] Schema / spec changes bump `spec_version` (see `SPEC.md`)
